description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring alternating cylindrical and spherical beads, strung together in a continuous loop. The cylindrical beads are a warm, light brown color, while the spherical beads are darker, possibly black or deep brown, with some metallic or reflective highlights. The necklace is displayed on a sleek, black, glossy mannequin bust, which accentuates the contrast and arrangement of the beads. The beads appear to be made from wood and metal, giving the necklace a natural yet urban-chic aesthetic. The clasp is a simple hook-and-loop style, visible at the back of the necklace. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on the natural textures and colors of the materials.
description: A minimalist beaded necklace with alternating light brown cylindrical and dark spherical beads, displayed on a glossy black bust. The design is simple and natural, with a subtle metallic accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the necklace's clasp and the symmetrical arrangement of beads around the neck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the necklace and the alternating bead pattern.
description_view_2: Full frontal view displaying the entire length and arrangement of the necklace, with all beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the necklace's curvature and bead sequence.
